title: Has CMS Energy (CMS) Outpaced Other Utilities Stocks This Year?
text: Here is how CMS Energy (CMS) and Atmos Energy (ATO) have performed compared to their sector so far this year.

title: Consumers Energy, State of Michigan Agree to Power Over 1,200 Public Buildings with 100% Clean Energy
text: JACKSON, Mich. , Aug. 11, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Consumers Energy and the State of Michigan today announced a pledge to power 1,274 publicly owned government buildings exclusively with clean energy, a visible commitment by the state's government and its largest energy provider to protect the planet.

title: Consumers Energy Gathering Opinions to Guide Planning Their Dams' Futures
text: Collecting Feedback from Community Meetings and Surveys JACKSON, Mich. , Aug. 9, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Consumers Energy is starting this month to gather opinions from the public about the 13 dams they own and operate on five Michigan rivers to help guide their decisions about the future of those electric generating facilities.

title: AES Earnings Beat Estimates, Revenues Increase Y/Y in Q2
text: AES Q2 revenues of $3,078 million increase 14% year over year and also beat the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 18.1%.
